text.title: Puppeteer Agent Workflow Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure to apply the puppeteer-agent-workflow methodology end-to-end.

step.name: decide-mode
step.action: Choose bash_worker (one-off) or queue_daemon (long-lived). Reject inline_llm_turn.
step.decision-gate: If mode would be inline, STOP and rewrite the plan.

step.name: scaffold-worker
step.action: Emit worker.js with puppeteer.launch + try/finally browser.close. Set page.setDefaultTimeout. Use waitUntil='domcontentloaded' + targeted waitForSelector.

step.name: selector-discipline
step.action: Pick attribute-based selectors (data-testid, id, aria-label). Document the chosen selector inline.

step.name: artifact-and-scrub
step.action: Write artifact JSON to disk. Pass through a secret scrubber (regex Bearer/cookie/JWT/PII patterns) before persisting.

step.name: auth-wall-guard
step.action: Add detection for login/CAPTCHA/2FA shapes; on hit, write a screenshot and exit non-zero with a clear message.
